creator: hecate@glitchbra.in
text:
Section 14.3 of the handbook, namely “Creating and Controlling Jails” seems to be too old, and should reflect more modern ways to install a base system, such as fetching base.txz from the FTP servers rather than the installation .iso.

This wiki could be useful in order to fix this bug: https://wiki.freebsd.org/VladimirKrstulja/Guides/Jails
